Agents

0/5 agents running—autonomous Web3 GTM

Hunter

Scans Twitter, Telegram, Discord & onchain sources for new leads

Outreach

Sends personalised first messages and follow-ups via Claude API

Qualification

Extracts hot/warm/cold signals from conversations using Claude

Onboarding

RAG-powered step-by-step guide using AimHigherAI knowledge base

Conversion

Sends nudges, tracks pool creation, fires urgency messages
